_comment: Auto-publish queue. The GitHub Action publishes queue[0] three times a week (Mon/Wed/Fri 09:00 UTC), then removes it. Newest-intended-first is NOT required; order = publish order (top publishes first). To add a post: write _drafts/<slug>.body.txt, add assets/images/og-<slug>.svg + rendered .png, and prepend/append an entry here. Fields: slug, title, description, og_title, og_desc, og_alt, tag (visible), cat (filter key: partnerships|growth|leadgen|operations|automation), read, summary (listing card).

queue.title: AI Lead Generation: What Actually Moves Pipeline
queue.description: AI lead generation is leverage on a system, not a substitute for one. Where AI genuinely moves pipeline, where it quietly hurts you, and how to adopt it without becoming the spam.
queue.og_title: AI Lead Generation: What Actually Moves Pipeline
queue.og_desc: Leverage on a system, not a substitute — where AI genuinely moves pipeline and where it quietly hurts you.
queue.summary: AI lead generation is leverage on a system, not a substitute for one. Where AI genuinely moves pipeline, where it quietly hurts you, and how to adopt it without becoming the spam.

queue.title: Lead Nurturing: Turning Interest Into Pipeline
queue.description: Most leads don't say no — they go quiet. Lead nurturing is the system that keeps you useful until the timing is right, turning the not-yet-ready majority into pipeline.
queue.og_title: Lead Nurturing: Turning Interest Into Pipeline
queue.og_desc: Most leads don't say no, they go quiet. A system for staying useful until the timing is right and converting the not-yet-ready.
queue.summary: Most leads don't say no — they go quiet. Lead nurturing is the system that keeps you useful until the timing is right, turning the not-yet-ready majority into pipeline.

queue.title: Sales Pipeline Management: A System for Predictable Revenue
queue.description: A pipeline is a forecast you can act on or a fiction that makes everyone feel busy. How to run stages by buyer action, keep it honest, and forecast on velocity, not vanity.
queue.og_title: Sales Pipeline Management: A System for Predictable Revenue
queue.og_desc: Stop storing optimism. Define stages by buyer action, keep the pipeline honest, and forecast on velocity instead of total value.
queue.summary: A pipeline is a forecast you can act on or a fiction that makes everyone feel busy. How to run stages by buyer action, keep it honest, and forecast on velocity, not vanity.

queue.title: Channel Partnerships: A Playbook for Partner-Led Growth
queue.description: Someone already sells to your exact buyer. Channel partnerships let you grow through their trust, but only when the partner's win is concrete and selling you is effortless.
queue.og_title: Channel Partnerships: A Playbook for Partner-Led Growth
queue.og_desc: Grow through other companies' trust, not just your own outreach — how to build a channel that actually sells instead of collecting logos.
queue.summary: Someone already sells to your exact buyer. Channel partnerships let you grow through their trust, but only when the partner's win is concrete and selling you is effortless.
